# Prompt Template - Textless Base Art

```text
Use case: <scientific-educational | illustration-story | historical-scene | ads-marketing | stylized-concept>
Asset type: textless base art for a front book cover, vertical composition
Primary request: Create polished editorial cover art for the book "<TITLE>". This is only the visual layer; title, subtitle, author, spine, and back cover will be added locally later. No letters, no title, no typography, no logo, no signature, no watermark.
Scene/backdrop: <visual setting coherent with the book genre and reading promise>
Subject: <main subject, narrative object, or concrete visual focus>
Style/medium: <realistic editorial digital painting | editorial photography | historical illustration | other style>
Composition/framing: vertical cover composition, clear visual focus, clean negative space for title, no text.
Lighting/mood: <lighting and emotional tone>
Color palette: <main palette>
Materials/textures: <relevant materials and textures>
Text (verbatim): none.
Constraints: no text of any kind; no readable marks; no logos; no watermark; no identifiable real people without authorization; commercial book-cover quality.
Avoid: text, letters, words, numbers, signature, logo, watermark, generic stock-photo look, empty abstraction, clutter, stereotypes, caricatures, gore, horror, inappropriate eroticization, false information about the topic.
```

## Notes

- Adapt the prompt to the book genre.
- For academic or technical books, the visual still needs a concrete subject, hierarchy, and editorial promise.
- If the image generator inserts letters or marks, generate a new base art before composing the cover.
